tasks.label: MASLIVE: Flutter build web (release no-wasm)
tasks.command: cd /workspaces/MASLIVE/app && flutter pub get && { [ -f /workspaces/MASLIVE/.env ] && source /workspaces/MASLIVE/.env; } 2>/dev/null || true && TOKEN=${MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN:-${MAPBOX_PUBLIC_TOKEN:-${MAPBOX_TOKEN:-}}} && if [ -n "$TOKEN" ]; then echo "Using MAPBOX token from env"; flutter build web --release --no-wasm-dry-run --dart-define=MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN="$TOKEN"; else echo "No MAPBOX token in env; building without MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN define"; flutter build web --release --no-wasm-dry-run; fi

tasks.label: MASLIVE: 🗺️ Set Mapbox token (.env)
tasks.command: read -rsp $'\nColle ton token Mapbox (pk.eyJ1...) puis appuie sur Entrée:\n' TOKEN && if [[ -z "$TOKEN" ]]; then echo '❌ Token vide, annulé.'; exit 1; fi && ENV_FILE=/workspaces/MASLIVE/.env && touch "$ENV_FILE" && for VAR in MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN MAPBOX_PUBLIC_TOKEN MAPBOX_TOKEN; do if grep -q "^${VAR}=" "$ENV_FILE"; then sed -i "s|^${VAR}=.*|${VAR}=${TOKEN}|" "$ENV_FILE"; else echo "${VAR}=${TOKEN}" >> "$ENV_FILE"; fi; done && echo '' && echo "✅ Token mis à jour dans $ENV_FILE" && echo '⚠️  Ce fichier est dans .gitignore — ne pas le committer.'

tasks.label: MASLIVE: Build Web & Deploy Hosting (diagnostic tail)
tasks.command: set -euo pipefail; cd /workspaces/MASLIVE/app; source /workspaces/MASLIVE/flutter_env.sh; flutter pub get; { [ -f /workspaces/MASLIVE/.env ] && source /workspaces/MASLIVE/.env; } 2>/dev/null || true; TOKEN=${MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN:-${MAPBOX_PUBLIC_TOKEN:-${MAPBOX_TOKEN:-}}}; if [ -z "$TOKEN" ]; then echo '❌ Token Mapbox manquant (MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN).'; exit 1; fi; echo "🗺️  Token Mapbox détecté: ${TOKEN:0:15}..."; echo '--- flutter build (tail) ---'; flutter build web --release --no-wasm-dry-run --dart-define=MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN="$TOKEN" 2>&1 | tail -n 200; cd /workspaces/MASLIVE; echo '--- firebase deploy (tail) ---'; firebase deploy --only hosting 2>&1 | tail -n 200

tasks.label: MASLIVE: Git commit + push (docs + livraison)
tasks.command:
set -euo pipefail
cd /workspaces/MASLIVE

DOC_FILES="FLOW_BOUTIQUE_COMPTE_ADMIN_GROUPE_PUBLICATION.md DOCUMENTATION_INDEX.md"
CODE_FILES="app/lib/pages/checkout/storex_checkout_stripe.dart app/lib/pages/seller/seller_order_detail_page.dart functions/index.js"

DOC_STATUS=$(git status --porcelain -- $DOC_FILES || true)
if [ -n "$DOC_STATUS" ]; then
  git add $DOC_FILES
  git commit -m "docs(shop): document flow publication boutique"
fi

CODE_STATUS=$(git status --porcelain -- $CODE_FILES || true)
if [ -n "$CODE_STATUS" ]; then
  git add $CODE_FILES
  git commit -m "feat(shop): persist shipping profile + attach shippingAddress to orders"
fi

git push origin main

tasks.command:
set -euo pipefail
rm -f /workspaces/MASLIVE/circuit_repository.dart && echo '✅ circuit_repository.dart supprimé'
rm -f /workspaces/MASLIVE/wizard_circuit_provider.dart && echo '✅ wizard_circuit_provider.dart supprimé'
rm -f /workspaces/MASLIVE/wizard_circuit_provider.dart && true
echo 'Nettoyage terminé'
